hero.title: Inlârna
hero.lead: IATF-in mipuite hmuh theihin a thawk a. Project thutlukna te, code change te, governance change te leh operation cost te chu mipuite hriat theihin hmun hrang hrangah chhinchhiah a ni a. He page-ah hian record chi tinte awmna leh chhiar dante tarlan a ni.

items: Project thutlûkna. Acceptance, archiving, leh reassignment thutlukna te chu issue emaw, release emaw angin a pawimawhna depotory-ah chhinchhiah a ni a, public registry-ah summarized a ni. View the public chhinchhiahA va lawmawm ve .

Record-te phût rawh. Public request records hi IATF GitHub organization-ah, he website-ah emaw, a pahnihah emaw dah a ni a. Record-te hian original request chu summarize, redact emaw, restructure emaw a ni thei a, chuvangin accessibility mamawh chu a tul lohva mimal hriatna dah chhuah lovin ennawn theih a ni. Discord decision-te hi project emaw, governance decision emaw a nghawng a nih chuan public record-ah summarized a ni ang. Request records hi search engine indexing-ah hian technically practicable-a dah theih loh. View records: first publication request pending.
Code a danglam a. Code thlakna tinte hi a pawimawhna depotary-a public commit a ni a. IATF en rawh GitHub inrelbawlnaA va lawmawm ve .
Rorêlna inthlâkthleng a ni. Governance page-a update-te chu iatf-website Repository. View the commit history GitHub-ah a awm a.

Operating cost-te pawh. IATF chuan operating cost a hniam a, public infrastructure expenses a record a. Kum 2022 atang khan a recurring cost lian ber chu domain name a ni a. Hosting chuan free-tier or low-cost infrastructure a hmang a. A hnuaia operating cost record hi en rawh.

Coordination note-te chu. Coordinated review emaw, thutlukna emaw note chu GitHub-ah a awm a. Discussions on the relevant repository view Inbiakremna chungchângah iatf-website dahkhawmna hmun (repository).

paragraphs: IATF chuan a public infrastructure chu a tumruhin a ti tlem a. Kum 2022 atang khan, operating cost lian ber chu domain name a ni a. Hosting-ah chuan free-tier infrastructure emaw, low-cost infrastructure emaw chu a theih chin chinah a hmang a ni.
He record hi audited financial statement a ni lo a, IATF online-a a hmanna tur infrastructure-a operating cost public log a ni.
operatingCosts.footnote: Receipt-te chu tihdanglam a nih hnuah tarlan leh chhuah theih a ni a. Personal address te, billing details te, leh account information mamawh loh te chu public record-ah a tel lo a ni.

items.label: Hriattîrna
items.value: Domain cost chu mugiwarafx-in a pe a. Hosting-ah chuan free-tier emaw, low-cost infrastructure emaw chu Cloudflare-ah a hmang a. Project chu Vercel aṭangin CloudFlare lamah a insawn a, a tawi zawk chu a hmang ṭan ta a. iatf.cc ram a ni.

items.label: Hriattîrna
items.value: Domain man chu mugiwarafx-in a pe a. Hosting-ah hian free-tier emaw, low-cost infrastructure emaw hman a ni.

items.label: Hriattîrna
items.value: Domain man chu mugiwarafx-in a pe a. Vercel hmangin free-tier emaw, low-cost infrastructure emaw hman a ni.

items.label: Hriattîrna
items.value: Domain man chu mugiwarafx-in a pe a. Hosting-ah hian free-tier emaw, low-cost infrastructure emaw hman a ni.

items.label: Hriattîrna
items.value: Domain man chu mugiwarafx-in a pe a. Hosting-ah hian free-tier infrastructure emaw, low-cost infrastructure emaw chu GitHub Pages hmanga hman a ni.

items: Diltute personal inbiakpawhna chi hrang hrang.
Private lehkhathawn chu pawm a nih hmain, pawm loh a nih hma emaw, summarized a nih hmâ emaw thil dîl chu hrilhfiah nân chauh hman a ni.
Private address te, phone number te, leh mimal chanchin pawimawh lo te.
Thlawptu thiamna hmangtu chu a remtihna tel lovin a hriat theih thil engpawh.
Raw Discord inbiakna te, a bik takin project record-a thawn luh a nih loh chuan.

header.title: Heng record-te hnungah hian Governance hi rulebook a ni a.

paragraphs: Project pawm dân te, archive dânte, leh assign dân te i hriat duh chuan governance page hi chhiar ang che.
